name: Lead enrichment pipeline with Exa research and email outreach
description: Takes lead names or companies from Google Sheets, uses Exa to research each lead online, enriches with Claude AI analysis, saves enriched data back to Sheets, and sends personalized outreach emails via Gmail.

source.originalName: Generate & enrich LinkedIn leads with Apollo.io, LinkedIn API, Mail.so & GPT-3.5

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for researching leads online

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for reading and updating lead data

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for sending outreach emails

leadName.description: Lead name or company to research (e.g. 'Jane Smith at Acme Corp')

outreachPurpose.description: Purpose of outreach (e.g. 'Schedule a demo of our project management tool')

steps.name: Build Exa research query for the lead
Research the lead with Exa web search
Build AI prompt for lead enrichment and email generation
Run Claude AI for lead enrichment
Format enriched lead data for Sheets
Save enriched lead data to Google Sheets
Send personalized outreach email via Gmail
